channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-07-16
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: Press release - EU defence innovation: deal with Council on new AGILE programme
item.description: The draft law aims to respond to the new security environment shaped by Russia's war of aggression against Ukraine, where fast and low-cost defence innovation cycles are critical. Committee on Industry, Research and Energy Committee on Security and Defence Source : © European Union, 2026 - EP — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european parliament - press releases) ; impact énergie / commerce.

item.title: Commission upgrades import monitoring mechanism
item.description: To respond to growing imbalances in global trade, the European Commission is upgrading its import monitoring toolbox by reconfiguring its ‘import barometer’, which gathers up-to-date import data and was originally established in 2025. — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european commission - eu trade news) ; impact énergie / commerce.

item.title: EU and India strengthen strategic partnership with third Trade and Technology Council
item.description: Today, the European Union and India held the third meeting of their Trade and Technology Council (TTC) in Brussels, reaffirming the TTC as a central platform for cooperation on trade, technology and security. — Thématique géopolitique ; source jugée fiable (european commission - eu trade news) ; impact énergie / commerce.
